root: ^You notice a child across the room from you...                                                                                      Click F to continue...
^"Hello.." you slowly start to approach him. "Are you also lost?"
^He shakes his head. He knows where you are!
^"Do you know how to get out??" you ask, maintaining a distance careful not to frighten him.
^He shrugs a bit, pointing to the door closest to you. It has a lock on it. If he knew the code, he would have escaped by now, you were sure of it.
^"Do you know how to find the code?" you ask, grasping onto your last string of hope.
^He points to the papers on the desk in the hall.
^He shakes his head, gesturing for you to read them for him.
^"Anything else?" you smile and ask, relieved to have a small hint.
^He mimes typing on a keyboard, hinting that maybe in the computer room there is another hint. Then his face lights up.
^He points to his paintings. Maybe he knows some of the clue?
^Hint.. click on the paintings/pc/papers to get a closer look.
